prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile is a DIFFERENT large object standing FREE on a small flat patch of clear blue water — the object itself rises straight up and IS the sprite. Do NOT put it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a tall raised cube: just a small low patch at the base, everything else transparent. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a half-sunken ship's mast 2) a tall stand of bamboo in the water 3) a tall willow leaning over the water 4) a tall mangrove with arching roots 5) a tall bare dead tree in the water 6) a lone lighthouse rock 7) a tall rock islet with a windswept tree 8) a weathered stone obelisk in the water 9) a wooden watchtower on stilts 10) a tall papyrus stand. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
